---
title: "Running Novor on: "
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_notebook:
    df_print: paged
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(assertthat)
library(plyr)
library(reshape2)
library(knitr)
library(MakeSearchSim)
library(ggplot2)
library(hexbin)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Reproducibility Information

Using below version of MakeSearchSim
```{r}
packageVersion("MakeSearchSim")
```

Below R version
```{r}
getRversion()
```



# Running Novor

```{r Load-inputs}
MGFs <- list.files(path = , pattern = ".mgf", full.names = TRUE)

#use NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_noAlk_Novor_params.txt for non-alkylated samples
param_file <- system.file("extdata", "NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_Alk_Novor_params.txt", package = "MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)

path_to_novor <- choose.files()
```

Outputs will be in the same directory as the inputs.
```{r Run-Novor}
res_files <- lapply(MGFs, runNovor, NovorParams = param_file, Novor_Path = path_to_novor)
rm(MGFs, param_file, path_to_novor)
```

# Import and Filter Results

```{r Import-Novor}
mgf_files <- list.files(pattern = "*.mgf")
novor_files <- list.files(pattern = "*._Novor.csv")

inputdf <- data.frame(NovorOutputFile = novor_files, MGF_file = mgf_files, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

#make the name of the object somewhat descriptive of the dataset run
RawNovorResults_uniquename <- mdply(inputdf, importSingleNovor)

#its reccomended to save the RawNovorResults dataframe so you don't have to import it again
# save(RawNovorResults_uniquename, file = )

rm(mgf_files, novor_files, inputdf)
```

Default filter to ALC > 70 and ppm +/- 15 ppm with minimum length of 6 (function defaults)

```{r Filter-Novor}
FiltNovorResults_uniquename <- filterNovor(RawNovorResults_uniquename)

#reccomended to save filtered dataframe
save(FiltNovorResults_uniquename, file = )
```


## Summary stats and plots
Generating basic counts of raw vs filtered PSMs per file

```{r psm-counts}
raw_psm_counts <- ddply(RawNovorResults_uniquename, .(MGFDataset), nrow)
colnames(raw_psm_counts) <- c("Dataset", "Raw_PSMs")
print("Raw PSM count distribution")
summary(raw_psm_counts$Raw_PSMs)

filt_psm_count <- ddply(FiltNovorResults_uniquename, .(MGFDataset), nrow)
colnames(filt_psm_count) <- c("Dataset", "Filt_PSMs")
print("Filtered PSM count distribution")
summary(filt_psm_count$Filt_PSMs)

psm_count_comp <- merge(filt_psm_count, raw_psm_counts)
psm_count_comp$PercentLoss <- (psm_count_comp$Raw_PSMs - psm_count_comp$PSMs)/psm_count_comp$Raw_PSMs

print("Distribition of Percent PSM loss do to filtering")
summary(psm_count_comp$PercentLoss)

write.csv(psm_count_comp, file = )

rm(filt_psm_count, raw_psm_counts)
```

Making hexbin plots of score distribution. 
Reccomended minimum score of 20 so you don't wash out plot.
```{r score-plots}
rawNovorPlots <- dlply(RawNovorResults_uniquename, .(MGFDataset), plotNovorHexBin)

GG_save_pdf(rawNovorPlots, filename = "")

#make sure to delete because object will be big
rm(rawNovorPlots)
```

# Digesting Peptides

```{r digest-peptides}
digest_stats <- ddply(FiltNovorResults_uniquename, .(MGFDataset), makePepFile, datasetCol = "MGFDataset", outputFileDir = )

colnames(digest_stats)[1] <- "Dataset"

write.csv(digest_stats, file = , row.names = FALSE)
```


# Session info
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
